_comment: Slack channels to monitor for EOD digest. Bot needs channels:history scope.

channels.name: general
channels._note: Replace id with real channel ID from Slack (right-click channel → Copy link → last part of URL)

_setup: 1. Create Slack app at api.slack.com/apps  2. Add OAuth scopes: channels:history channels:read  3. Install to workspace  4. Copy Bot Token → export SMARTDIGEST_SLACK_BOT_TOKEN=xoxb-...
